[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100000111 5
1 1100110111 7
2 1010010111 6
3 1111100101 7
4 1101101111 8
5 0011011111 7
6 1111111110 9
7 1100100111 6

12 21 1110110000 5
23 32 0101000011 4
34 43 0011111000 5
45 54 0011001000 3
56 65 0101101000 4
67 76 0010111111 7
70 07 1110011000 5

02 20 1100111100 6
13 31 1011110011 7
24 42 0110111011 7
35 53 0000110000 2
46 64 0110100000 3
57 75 0111010111 7
60 06 1100100111 6 match 7
71 17 1100010100 4
